_doc: API Component Registry: Layer A canonical library (FULLSTACK_COMPONENT_LIBRARY_ROADMAP §1, opened 2026-07-17). SSOT for the edge-function canonical modules in supabase/functions/_shared/. Adoption is MEASURED by tools/api_adoption_census.py (import-based detection over every function's index.ts); forward-only floors live in api_adoption_baseline.json. Same P0-P6 template as Layer F.

components.name: envelope.ts
components.when_to_use: every JSON-returning function (one response shape platform-wide)
components.exempt_reason: login/supervisor-reset-password: bespoke pre-envelope auth-response contracts that pages consume (converging the shape breaks callers: a coordinated refactor backlog item, not a census checkbox); cold-archive-query: internal sub-call whose response contract is consumed by agentic-rag-loop.

components.name: tenant-context.ts
components.exempt_reason: triage 2026-07-17, three verified classes: (1) OWN membership gate predating tenant-context.ts (ai/analytics-orchestrator, asset-brain-query, batch-risk-scoring, export-hive-data, supervisor-reset-password: the 2026-06-07 cross-hive-IDOR fix idiom, functionally equivalent; converge-to-canonical = refactor BACKLOG, not a hole); (2) gateway-resolved tenancy (voice-journal-agent, intelligence-api, parts-staging-recommender, pdf-ingest: ai-gateway/platform-gateway resolve tenancy centrally per their headers); (3) HMAC-verified webhook (cmms-webhook-receiver, X-WorkHive-Signature sha256).

components.name: ai-chain.ts
components.exempt_reason: DEPRECATED/ORPHANED (verified 2026-07-12: zero callers; own internal multi-model fallback; retirement pending: do NOT wire callers, use ai-gateway)

components.name: rate-limit.ts
components.exempt_reason: gateway-routed specialists: ai-gateway 'applies the rate-limit gate ONCE (vs every orchestrator gating)' and platform-gateway 'per-route rate-limit caps live HERE, not on the specialists': verified 2026-07-17 in both gateways' headers+imports. A per-fn limit here would double-limit routed traffic. no-caller quartet (data-fabric-normalizer, login, platform-scraper, tts-speak) stays UNexempt pending orphan/entry-point verification. data-fabric-normalizer: Phase-5 SCAFFOLDING (no live callers); MUST gain ingest rate-limiting before its first external wiring: recorded as the activation requirement. login: own dedicated lockout RPCs (check_login_lockout/record_login_failure per-identifier+IP, 423 pre-GoTrue): purpose-built brute-force protection, a generic bucket would be redundant. fmea-populator + visual-defect-capture: ALREADY rate-limited via a LOCAL checkAIRateLimit(verified hive) — the import-based census misclassified them as gaps; adding checkSoloRateLimit was REDUNDANT and tripped validate_policy_hive_binding (reverted 2026-07-17). Lesson: import-based detection misses local-fn rate-limiters; check for a local checkAIRateLimit before flagging an AI fn as an A5 gap.

components.name: ssrf-guard.ts
components.when_to_use: any function fetching a caller-influenced URL
components.exempt_reason: verified 2026-07-17: each fetches a FIXED hardcoded provider endpoint (googleapis / resend / jina): no caller-influenced URL, no SSRF exposure. The triage test for future gaps: is any part of the URL caller-influenced?

components.name: redactPII.ts
components.when_to_use: text pipelines carrying worker-authored content outward

components.name: health.ts
components.when_to_use: every function (the health-surface discovery gate keys on it)

components.name: cache.ts / context-budget.ts
components.when_to_use: hot-path reads (cache) and LLM context assembly (budget)
